overall.description: A spaceship with glowing blue thrusters flies through a psychedelic warp tunnel characterized by streaking rainbow light effects. The vessel maneuvers around floating asteroids and debris before approaching a large spherical planetary body. This is stylized game engine footage with vibrant, abstract visuals suggesting high-speed space travel.

floating rock debris drifting through the flight path

segments.scene_description: The spaceship flies through a vibrant, psychedelic warp tunnel with streaking rainbow light effects. The vessel maneuvers around scattered asteroid debris in the open space environment, with the camera following smoothly from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large planetary body in warp space

segments.scene_description: The spaceship continues through the warp tunnel as a large dark spherical planetoid comes into view. The vessel banks and maneuvers around the object as it grows larger in the frame, moving from the far right to near right position while colorful light streaks continue to radiate through the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a psychedelic warp tunnel that transitions from an open field of debris toward a massive celestial body. It begins with the spaceship gliding through a vibrant void of streaking rainbow light, maneuvering smoothly around scattered asteroid debris. As the vessel pushes forward, the colorful light streaks continue to radiate through the background while a large, dark spherical planetoid gradually emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts as the spaceship banks and maneuvers around the object, which grows larger in the frame and moves from the far right to the near right. Finally, the camera maintains its pursuit of the vessel as it navigates the narrowing space between the warp effects and the looming planetary mass.
